notes: harness_selector.rs:230 — Button::set_tooltip UI string, translated; brand 'Warp' and 'Warp Agent' preserved. notifications_error.rs:49 — InlineBannerTextButton.text UI button label, imperative '设置权限'. remote_server_controller.rs:579 — connection_label_from_user_and_host fallback display label rendered in UI, translated '远程主机'. file.rs:142 — io::Error::other internal invariant message ('full_path should never be root directory.'), assertion-style developer diagnostic returned as error, never UI; flagged panic_message. welcome_banner.rs:109 — Text::new modal title, onboarding UI, translated; 'Warp' and 'Agent' preserved per glossary. sync_client.rs:269 — .expect('Node should be leaf') panic. selection.rs:114 — .expect('Truncating to literal 1 cannot fail') panic. input_type.rs:27 — FromStr Err(format!) parse-error string with literal 'shell'/'ai' identifiers, surfaces in error/log chain not UI; flagged telemetry_payload. settings/lib.rs:487,492 — anyhow .context(format!) error-context string for internal storage write failure, surfaces in error chain/logs; flagged telemetry_payload (placeholder {} preserved if it were translated, but flagged). web_event_bus/lib.rs:47 — .expect('Event must convert to JavaScript') panic. winit event_loop/mod.rs:2067 — .expect downcast panic. warpui_core elements/mod.rs:704 — .expect mutex lock panic. radio_buttons.rs:210 — .expect('No font family') panic on Option font_family_id.
